diagnosis.final_diagnosis: Increased fluorodeoxyglucose uptake in skeletal muscle
diagnosis.diagnostic_reasoning: The patient demonstrated asymmetrical moderately increased FDG uptake in skeletal muscle 48 hours after engaging in strenuous activity (digging in the garden) and was relatively inactive before the scan. There was no reported muscle or shoulder pain on the day of the scan, and existing literature supports the phenomenon of delayed FDG uptake following exercise.
